sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53124" key="kanonistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰνον-ιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n53124.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">regulative</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἱ κανόνες τῶν ὑγιῶν, οὐ τῶν πεπονθότων εἰσὶ -κοί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Heph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.226C.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
